title: callitriche autumnalis var. linearis
intro: Callitriche autumnalis var. linearis, also known as autumnal water-starwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callitriche autumnalis var. linearis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
